title: Globe Wernicke barrister bookcase
description: Oak, 5 shelves, nice condition.  Not all glass is original

title: Globe Wernicke barrister bookcase
description: Walnut, 4 shelves, nice condition. Not all glass is original.

title: Quarter-Sawn Oak Writer's Desk
description: A substantial quarter-sawn oak set featuring a desk with manuscript drawers and brass-labeled file drawers, paired with a matching swivel armchair. The chair bears a "Property, City of Houston" tag

title: Jersey Grain Company Wood Pail
description: An antique wood grain feed bucket with wrought iron handle and reinforced corners, embossed "Jersey Grain Company"

title: Mid-Century Walnut Lamp with Spaghetti Resin Shade
description: Walnut base with an a spun "spaghetti" resin shade in swirling amber and cream tones

title: Jacobean Revival oak library/side table
description: Oak side table with barley-twist legs, lock and key, carved drawer pulls, and quarter-sawn construction. Likely early 1900s.

title: Victorian Oak Spindle-Leg Lamp Table
description: Quarter-sawn oak top and turned tapering legs with a lower display shelf, likely 1890–1910.

title: Primitive Tool Chest & Bench Set
description: Old red-painted wooden tool chest with working hinges and hasp, displayed atop a rustic primitive bench. Sold together as a styled cabin storage set.

title: Farmhouse Extension Table and 4 Chairs
description: Table extends to seat >10, but we only have chairs for 4.

title: 1936 Westinghouse Ice Box
description: Off-white enameled metal genuine 1936 Westinghouse ice box confirmed by the original "Golden Jubilee" emblem on the cabinet.  Original chrome latch hardware still intact and fully functional.

title: Woodard-Style Wrought Iron Patio Table & 4 Chairs
description: Beautiful mid-century wrought iron patio set with a glass-top table, an ornate scrolled spider-leg base, plus 4 matching chairs with rose-and-leaf detailing.  Cushions need cleaned or replaced.
